description:
The rsyncd service can be used to synchronize files between systems over network links. The rsync-daemon package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove rsync-daemon
rationale:
The rsyncd service presents a security risk as it uses unencrypted protocols for
communication.
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the rsync-daemon package is installed: 
$ rpm -q rsync-daemon
fixtext:
To remove the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 package rsync-daemon run the following command:

$ sudo dnf remove rsync-daemon
title: Uninstall rsync Package
